name: User verifies admin get-org-users output via CLI
description:
- Login with valid credentials via **UI**.
- Get Bearer auth token from Playwright local storage.
- Signup `second user` via **UI**.
- Login with Bearer auth token via **CLI**.
- Create first organization via **CLI**.
- Invite `second user` to organization via **CLI**.
- Run `apolo admin get-org-users` command via **CLI**.

### Verify that:

- Organization members are listed with valid data in command output.
descriptionHtml:
• Login with valid credentials via UI.
  • Get Bearer auth token from Playwright local storage.
  • Signup second user via UI.
  • Login with Bearer auth token via CLI.
  • Create first organization via CLI.
  • Invite second user to organization via CLI.
  • Run apolo admin get-org-users command via CLI.

Verify that:

  • Organization members are listed with valid data in command output.

steps.name: Verify Apolo CLI client is installed

testStage.description:
- Login with valid credentials via **UI**.
- Get Bearer auth token from Playwright local storage.
- Signup `second user` via **UI**.
- Login with Bearer auth token via **CLI**.
- Create first organization via **CLI**.
- Invite `second user` to organization via **CLI**.
- Run `apolo admin get-org-users` command via **CLI**.

### Verify that:

- Organization members are listed with valid data in command output.
testStage.descriptionHtml:
• Login with valid credentials via UI.
  • Get Bearer auth token from Playwright local storage.
  • Signup second user via UI.
  • Login with Bearer auth token via CLI.
  • Create first organization via CLI.
  • Invite second user to organization via CLI.
  • Run apolo admin get-org-users command via CLI.

Verify that:

  • Organization members are listed with valid data in command output.
